content.speakerText: Hey, I'd love to get a photo with you in front of the landmark. Could you help?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我想在地标前和你拍张照，你能帮个忙吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! Where should I stand? I'll make sure the landmark is behind us.
Sure! Let me check the camera settings first—I want it to look great.
Happy to! Just give me a second to switch to photo mode.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确同意并主动参与构图或准备
语言准确性：使用恰当动词如 stand, check, switch，结构完整
表达自然度：语气热情，使用口语连接词如 'just', 'happy to', 'a second'

content.scenarioHint: 游客在风景优美的地标前，想请导游帮忙拍一张自己与背景的合影，并希望导游能调整拍摄角度以获得更好效果。
content.speakerText: Could you take a photo of me here with the waterfall in the background? Maybe step back a bit so it fits better?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能帮我在这里拍张照片吗？背景是瀑布，能不能往后退一点，把整个瀑布都拍进去？
expectedAnswers: Of course! I'll frame it so the waterfall fills the top third—ready when you are.
Sure thing! Stand right there—I'll use the wide-angle mode.
Absolutely! Let me adjust the height so your face is centered with the falls behind you.
No problem! I'll take two shots—one with you smiling and one with your arms out.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了拍照请求和具体要求（如背景、角度）
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的礼貌表达和描述性词汇
表达自然度：符合英语母语者在旅游场景中的自然表达习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'photo', 'background', 'step back', 'frame' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 游客和朋友一行五人想请导游帮忙拍一张全员合影，但担心导游不熟悉手机拍照功能，因此表达理解并给予灵活选择。
content.speakerText: We'd love a group photo—would you mind helping us? No worries if you're not comfortable with the phone settings!
content.speakerTextCn: 我们想拍一张全家福，你能帮我们拍一下吗？如果你不熟悉手机设置也没关系！
expectedAnswers: Happy to help! Let’s all stand in a curve—I’ll use the timer so I can join too.
Of course! I can use the front camera and hold it high—just say 'cheese' when you're ready.
Sure! If you’d prefer, I can hand you the phone and show you how to use the group timer.
No problem at all—I’ll do my best! If it doesn’t turn out great, we can try again.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达合影需求并体现对对方能力的理解与包容
语言准确性：使用了恰当的委婉表达（如 'no worries', 'if you're not comfortable'）
表达自然度：符合真实旅游场景中游客与导游之间的友好互动语气
关键词覆盖：使用了 'group photo', 'help', 'phone settings', 'timer' 等核心词汇
